summary: Completed testing for Iteration 34 - Multi-Store Currency Feature. Backend tests: 15/15 passed. Frontend: Both India (/tnv) and Pakistan (/tnv-pk) stores display correct currency symbols, flags, and store-specific configurations.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend analytics API correctly returns currency based on store parameter (INR for tnvcollection, PKR for tnvcollectionpk)
Backend checkout cart API correctly returns currency and free shipping thresholds based on store parameter
Frontend TNVStoreLayout.jsx has STORE_CONFIGS with correct currency symbols (₹ for INR, Rs. for PKR)
Frontend TNVHeader correctly displays store-specific logo (TNV vs TNV PK) and region flag
Frontend TNVCart uses baseUrl from storeConfig for navigation links (/tnv vs /tnv-pk)
Frontend TNVCheckout uses storeConfig for currency and shipping thresholds
Frontend CheckoutPage detects store from URL path and uses appropriate STORE_CONFIGS
Sales Dashboard has store selector dropdown with both INR and PKR options
App.js has separate route wrappers: TNVStoreWrapper for India, TNVPKStoreWrapper for Pakistan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested Multi-Store Currency feature. Key findings: India store (/tnv) displays ₹ (INR) with free shipping at ₹2000, Pakistan store (/tnv-pk) displays Rs. (PKR) with free shipping at Rs.5000. Backend APIs accept 'store' query parameter. Frontend uses STORE_CONFIGS in TNVStoreLayout.jsx and CheckoutPage.jsx. Sales Dashboard has store selector dropdown. All tests passed.

backend_api.GET /api/analytics/overview?store=tnvcol: PASS - Returns INR currency with ₹ symbol
PASS - Returns PKR currency with Rs. symbol
backend_api.GET /api/checkout/cart/{session_id}?stor: PASS - Returns INR with ₹2000 free shipping threshold
PASS - Returns PKR with Rs.5000 free shipping threshold
